title: ah custom runner envelope
description: Envelope emitted on stdout by a configured [runners.custom.<name>] command. Each object in findings MUST conform to check-output.schema.json#/$defs/finding. The envelope encodes the runner's self-reported verdict; ah applies the precedence matrix in design.md (D5) to resolve the final outcome against the process exit code.

exit_code.description: The custom runner process exit code as observed by ah.

passed.description: True when the runner considers the invocation successful. MUST be true if and only if findings is empty: a passing verdict cannot carry failure reasons, and a failing verdict MUST cite at least one finding.

findings.description: Normalized findings produced by the runner; items conform to check-output.schema.json#/$defs/finding.
